description_long: This is a compact, rectangular portable radio receiver with a black plastic body and a telescopic metal antenna extending from the top. The front face features a large speaker grille on the left, a digital display screen on the upper right, and a grid of tactile buttons below the display for tuning and control. A red and white 'MW/2Radio' brand label is prominently displayed above the speaker grille. The right side of the device has a large rotary dial for volume or tuning, and the left side includes a headphone jack and a wrist strap for carrying. The back panel contains technical information, battery compartment access, and the base of the antenna, while the overall design is utilitarian and suitable for urban or outdoor use.
description: A black portable radio receiver with a telescopic antenna, digital display, speaker grille, and control buttons, featuring a red 'MW/2Radio' label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, digital display, control buttons, and the 'MW/2Radio' label.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the rotary dial and the slim profile of the radio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the technical information, battery compartment, and the base of the antenna.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the headphone jack and the attached wrist strap.
